creator: lhersch@dssgmbh.de
text:
I try drm-kmod since the deprecated warning from drm-legacy-kmod with each new version. Unfortunately the xorg server doesn't start anymore. And yes I have a GMA X3100 graphics card.

This is the output from pciconf.

vgapci0@pci0:0:2:0:     class=0x030000 card=0x011f1025 chip=0x2a028086 rev=0x03 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Intel Corporation'
    device     = 'Mobile GM965/GL960 Integrated Graphics Controller (primary)'
    class      = display
    subclass   = VGA
